title: xolisma octandra
side_effects: Xolisma octandra can have side effects if used improperly, such as respiratory problems, skin irritation, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also cause dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In severe cases, improper use of the Xolisma octandra plant may lead to more serious health issues, including liver damage and increased heart rate. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any part of the plant to avoid these potential side effects.
